titleStmt.title: SII 16.41: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 41. (A.R. No. 166 of 1913.) PĀṆEM, NANDYAL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the courtyard of the Pāṇikēśvarasvāmin temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1425, Rudhirōdgārin, Śrāvaṇa śu. 15, Monday, corresponding to 1503 A.D., August 7.

It registers the gift of lands in Pāṇem situated in Penugoṇḍa-chāvaḍi to the sthānikas of the temple of Pāṇikēśvara by Honnappa-nāyaka, son of Bokkasam Dēvappa-nāyaka for conducting worship in the temple for the merit of the king and Narasā-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1425 Agunēṭi rudhirōdgārisaṁvvatsara śrāva
ṇa śu 15 so śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mēdinimīsaragaṁḍa
kaṭhārisāḷuva yimaḍi narasiṁgarāyamahārāyalu pṛtivirājyamu
sēyaṁgānu narasānāyaniṁgāru māku pāliṁccina penugoṁḍa cā
vaḍiki celle pānenanu śrīmatu bokkasamu devappanāyaniṁgāri komā
ruṁḍu hoṁnapanāyaniṁgāru pāṇikēśvaradēvara stānikulu nālu
guvāḷa tapōdharulaku yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ rāyalakuṁnnu
narasānāyaniṁgārikiṁnni puṇyamugānu pāṇikēśvara dēvara
Aṁggaraṁgavaibhavālaku dhāravōśi yiccina kāḍāraṁbhaṁ catu
ssīmakuṁnu meralugānu cūpitāṁ tolina polaṁ gaṁggaṁ
vānikuṁṭaku vu ttarānaku lokkulakuṁṭa bayirānikiṁ bboye
baṁḍitiruvu mrōciṁni tūrpuku pāṇikēśvaradēvara bayira
vadēvaravriticēla śāsanapurāślumōvānu dakṣaṇānaku telā
ri guṁḍlatōṁva niḍina liṁgamudraśāsanaṁ mōvānu paḍu
maṭiki koṁḍamōvānu yī catussīmānu mīkumaḍi
volaṁgānu mīku pallegaṭṭukōnu dāravōśi yi stimi
varimaḍi peṁjerula venakanu khānubaḍāvāri staḷaṁ ma
ruturu 11 dāravōśi yistimi Ā polaṁlōnu mī mana
suvaccina cōṭanu pallegaṭṭukoni Ā palleṁgala nīrāraṁbhaṁ kāḍā
raṁbhaṁ suṁkhasuvarnādāya sahitamugānu dāravōśi
palle sarvamānyaṁgānu kāvalipālu śrōtriyā
gulu mōdalugānu māni dāravō
nidi nikṣēpa Āgāmi Akṣīṇa
myaṁgānu dāra
gānu
nu
Aṭugānu dharmā
naḍapiṁcēdi . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dā
lanaṁ . dānāt svarga mavāpnōti pālanā Acyu
svadatāṁ paradattāṁ hva . yō harēti vasuṁdha
ṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi . viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ . paradattānu pālanaṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . maṁgaḷamahā
śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī jēyunu . śrīśrīśrī
I dharmānaku yavaḍu tapinā
nu vāṇarasilōnu siṁḍamō
ṁḍa tinavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 16.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
